prompt: A 3×2 vertical editorial portrait collage featuring six candid lifestyle photographs of a beautiful young East Asian woman with long glossy black hair styled in a loose high ponytail, soft wispy bangs, fair luminous skin, delicate feminine features, expressive eyes, and a naturally elegant appearance. She is photographed inside a cozy modern bedroom with warm ambient lighting, cream-colored bedding, soft curtains, framed photos on the wall, a glowing bedside lamp, and a calm minimalist Korean interior aesthetic. Outfit: matching luxury loungewear set in warm oatmeal-beige tones, consisting of a soft ribbed cropped camisole, relaxed high-waisted lounge pants, and an oversized textured knit cardigan draped casually off one shoulder. Premium knit fabrics with visible texture and natural folds. Each frame captures a different relaxed pose and expression: 1. Sitting cross-legged on the bed, shoulders slightly forward, looking directly into the camera with a gentle soft smile. 2. Sitting comfortably with one sleeve partially covering her hand, eyes closed while smiling naturally as if reacting to a pleasant thought. 3. Leaning slightly to one side, chin resting lightly on her hand, gazing thoughtfully out of frame. 4. Looking toward the window with warm sunlight illuminating her profile, relaxed posture and natural expression. 5. Resting her cheek against one hand while giving a playful wink and subtle smile. 6. Sitting sideways on the bed with knees drawn in slightly, gazing into the distance with a calm contemplative expression. Lighting: soft morning and golden-hour window light, warm practical lamp glow, subtle highlights on skin, realistic shadows, cozy atmospheric illumination. Photography style: candid lifestyle portraiture, Korean fashion editorial, intimate bedroom photography, authentic expressions, relaxed body language, natural skin texture, visible fabric detail, shallow depth of field, cinematic warmth, realistic color grading. Composition: six evenly spaced vertical portrait panels arranged in a clean 3×2 collage layout, each frame offering a unique pose and mood while maintaining visual consistency. Mood: cozy, intimate, feminine, peaceful, inviting, relaxed luxury, quiet weekend morning aesthetic. Ultra-realistic, photorealistic, high detail, premium editorial photography, Vogue Korea inspired, natural beauty, soft focus background, 8K quality.
